<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\VarExporter; interface LazyObjectInterface { /** * Returns whether the object is initialized. * * @param bool $partial Whether partially initialized objects should be considered as initialized */ public function isLazyObjectInitialized(bool $partial = false): bool; /** * Forces initialization of a lazy object and returns it. */ public function initializeLazyObject(): object; /** * @return bool Returns false when the object cannot be reset, ie when it's not a lazy object */ public function resetLazyObject(): bool; }
